sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5503" key="a)mpelou/rghma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμπελούργ-ημα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n5503.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vine-dresser's work,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:140" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.140</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
